notes: Initializes the native macOS window manager before every method dispatch, independent of Dart call ordering.
Prevents saved opacity restoration from accessing the native window before the desktop shell starts.
Makes every macOS window-manager titlebar lookup safe for borderless main and preview windows.
Verifies the app with strict code-signing checks inside the final DMG and removes Finder metadata that could invalidate the signature.
Includes a branded drag-to-Applications DMG with the DingDong logo, an installation arrow, and an in-volume permissions guide.
Explains first launch, Accessibility, clipboard, and login-item permissions without requesting unrelated access.
Adds guided GitHub forms for problem reports and feature requests, with privacy reminders.
Adds optional, off-by-default Aptabase diagnostics that never include clipboard content, paths, messages, or stack traces.
